'''''Challenge'' 68''' was a roleplaying magazine from January of [[1993]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Parts is Parts]]" and was written by [[Wallace D. Greer]].
